workflows.description: Generate HI7 train/test ARFF data for the classic HDD classification baseline.
notes: Runs the upstream loader from pyloader/ with repository-root path resolution.
Use this before HI7 classic training.

workflows.description: Run the classic Adaptive Random Forest baseline on preprocessed HI7 data.
notes: Requires HI7 preprocessing outputs.
Requires simulate/ and moa/ jars to be built.

workflows.description: Generate HI7 regression train/test data used by the regression baseline.
notes: Runs inside pyloader/ because the upstream loader uses relative paths.

workflows.description: Run the HI7 regression experiment on preprocessed regression data.
notes: Requires pyloader/run_hi7_reg_loader.sh outputs to exist.

workflows.description: Run the classic transfer-learning experiment for HI640 using the upstream pipeline.
notes: Requires transfer-learning preprocessing outputs under pyloader/.

workflows.description: Run the SSD-side MC1 MLP baseline.
notes: Requires MC1 preprocessing outputs and enough memory for Java.

workflows.description: Prepare framework_v1 inputs and contracts for the main cross-model LLM workflow.
notes: Automatically sources configs/public_repro.env if it exists.
Mainly CPU and filesystem work.

env.name: RUN_TAG
env.label: Run Tag
env.help: Optional output tag used by framework_v1.

workflows.display_name: LLM / Framework V1 / Phase 1 Window Text
workflows.description: Generate Phase1 textual summaries used as the main LLM input.
notes: Outputs go to llm/framework_v1/ and are ignored by Git.

env.name: RUN_TAG
env.label: Run Tag
env.help: Optional output tag used by framework_v1.

workflows.description: Run the main Phase2 offline LLM extraction flow for framework_v1.
notes: Requires a CUDA-capable GPU and a local compatible model checkpoint.
workflows.warning: GPU required. This can be a long-running extraction job.

env.name: RUN_TAG
env.label: Run Tag
env.help: Optional output tag used by framework_v1.

workflows.description: Run the full all12 HDD flow end-to-end: Phase2 extraction first, then Phase3 grid evaluation.
notes: This is the end-to-end wrapper for the common HDD pilot20k experiment path.
Auto shutdown is disabled by default.
workflows.warning: GPU required for Phase2. Phase3 is CPU and Java heavy.

env.name: RUN_TAG
env.label: Run Tag
env.help: Shared Phase2 output tag.

env.name: PHASE3_RUN_TAG
env.label: Phase3 Run Tag
env.help: Usually matches RUN_TAG.

env.name: PHASE3_TAG_SUFFIX
env.label: Phase3 Tag Suffix
env.help: Suffix for Phase3 result files.

workflows.description: Run the pilot20k Phase2 extraction across all 12 HDD models with auto-shutdown disabled by default.
notes: The normalized wrapper forces AUTO_SHUTDOWN=0 unless you override it explicitly.
Use TARGET_KEYS to restrict to a subset of models.
workflows.warning: GPU required. Long-running job. Auto shutdown is off by default in the wrapper.

env.name: RUN_TAG
env.label: Run Tag
env.help: Phase2 output tag.

env.name: TARGET_KEYS
env.label: Target Models
env.help: Optional comma-separated model keys. Leave empty for all12.

env.name: MODEL_PATH
env.label: Model Path
env.help: Optional local model override.

workflows.description: Run the pilot20k Phase3 grid evaluation across all 12 HDD models.
notes: CPU-heavy evaluation step after Phase2 extraction is complete.

env.name: PHASE3_RUN_TAG
env.label: Phase3 Run Tag
env.help: Phase3 input tag. Usually matches Phase2 run tag.

env.name: PHASE3_TAG_SUFFIX
env.label: Tag Suffix
env.help: Suffix used in Phase3 result filenames.

env.name: MAX_WINDOWS
env.label: Max Windows
env.help: Upper bound for each model's input windows.

workflows.description: Run the single-model pilot20k calibration branch: restricted Phase2 extraction followed by single-model Phase3 grid evaluation.
notes: Intended for models that are already registered in the public pilot20k scripts.
This is the closest UI entrypoint to the new-model admission-test branch documented in README.
It does not auto-register the resulting policy; it only produces the calibration outputs.
workflows.warning: Requires a registered model key. GPU is needed for Phase2; Phase3 is CPU-heavy.

env.name: MODEL_KEY
env.label: Model Key
env.help: Required registered model key. Example: st31500541as.

env.name: RUN_TAG
env.label: Run Tag
env.help: Shared Phase2 output tag for this calibration run.

env.name: PHASE3_TAG_SUFFIX
env.label: Tag Suffix
env.help: Suffix appended to Phase3 output filenames.

env.name: MODEL_PATH
env.label: Model Path
env.help: Optional local model override used by Phase2.

env.name: MAX_WINDOWS
env.label: Max Windows
env.help: Upper bound for the pilot input windows.

workflows.description: Run the new-model onboarding branch from a raw DISK_MODEL name: build contract, generate event mapping, run no-LLM baseline, then execute pilot20k Phase2 and Phase3 calibration.
notes: This workflow is designed for previously unseen HDD disk models.
You only need to provide DISK_MODEL; model_key, contract path, event mapping path, baseline path, and policy suggestion are derived automatically.
The workflow writes a suggested calibration YAML under llm/calibration/generated/ and a sidecar JSON with the best row.
workflows.warning: GPU required for Phase2 and Java artifacts must already be built for baseline and Phase3.

env.name: DISK_MODEL
env.label: Disk Model
env.help: Required raw disk model name as it appears in the HDD CSV data.

env.name: RUN_TAG
env.label: Run Tag
env.help: Optional calibration tag. Leave empty to derive it from DISK_MODEL.

env.name: MODEL_PATH
env.label: Model Path
env.help: Optional local model override used by Phase2 extraction.

env.name: MAX_WINDOWS
env.label: Max Windows
env.help: Upper bound for the pilot calibration windows.

env.name: PHASE3_TAG_SUFFIX
env.label: Tag Suffix
env.help: Suffix appended to Phase3 output filenames.

workflows.description: Run the batch7 HDD Phase2 zero-shot extraction flow.
notes: Good when you want the expansion set only instead of the full all12 wrapper.

env.name: MODEL_PATH
env.label: Model Path
env.help: Optional local model override.

env.name: BATCH_SIZE
env.label: Batch Size
env.help: Phase2 batch size.

env.name: MAX_WINDOWS
env.label: Max Windows
env.help: Upper bound for each model's input windows.

workflows.description: Run the corrected MC1 stratified_v2 flow end-to-end: reuse prepared input, run Phase2 extraction, then Phase3 grid evaluation.
notes: Defaults are aligned with the corrected MC1 stratified_v2 experiment path.
No full-year SSD rescan is triggered by default.
workflows.warning: GPU required for Phase2. Phase3 is CPU and Java heavy.

env.name: PHASE2_RUN_TAG
env.label: Phase2 Run Tag
env.help: Tag used for MC1 Phase2 cache output.

env.name: PHASE3_RUN_TAG
env.label: Phase3 Run Tag
env.help: Input tag used by the MC1 Phase3 script.

env.name: PHASE3_TAG_SUFFIX
env.label: Phase3 Tag Suffix
env.help: Suffix appended to Phase3 result files.

workflows.description: Run the MC1 pilot20k Phase2 extraction flow.
notes: Useful for SSD-side LLM validation.

env.name: RUN_TAG
env.label: Run Tag
env.help: Output tag used for MC1 cache files.

env.name: MODEL_PATH
env.label: Model Path
env.help: Optional local model override.

workflows.description: Run the MC1 Phase3 grid evaluation over cache variants.
notes: Runs CPU and Java simulation after MC1 Phase2 outputs are ready.

env.name: RUN_TAG
env.label: Run Tag
env.help: Input tag used for MC1 Phase2 outputs.

env.name: PHASE3_COMBO_LIMIT
env.label: Combo Limit
env.help: How many new Phase3 combos to run in this invocation. Use 0 for all.

env.name: PHASE3_EXTRACT_MODE
env.label: Extract Mode
env.help: Usually zs or fs.

workflows.description: Tail all12 Phase2 progress by cache rows, active model, and GPU state.
notes: Read-only monitor. Does not launch extraction by itself.

env.name: RUN_TAG
env.label: Run Tag
env.help: Used to locate the newest summary file.

env.name: SUMMARY_TSV
env.label: Summary TSV
env.help: Optional explicit summary file path.

env.name: INTERVAL_SEC
env.label: Interval Seconds
env.help: Sampling interval.

workflows.description: Validate that the local workbench registry loads cleanly.
notes: Use after changing ui/workflows.json or adding new aliases.
